summary: Completed backend and frontend verification for grade predicate default ranges, admin GET/PUT predicate management (global + per class), validation rules, single/bulk grading predicate persistence, submission enrichment behavior, Excel export Predikat column, and admin/student UI predicate integrations on desktop + mobile.
action_items: Optional quality cleanup: resolve react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in src/App.js (loadAll/loadStudent useEffect).
critical_code_review_comments: Requested predicate/grading/export features are implemented and functioning in integrated backend+frontend checks.
Frontend build passes with non-blocking ESLint warnings (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps).
seed_data_creation: Created transient test assignments/submissions for seeded student during predicate grading regression; also reset seeded student password to documented credential via admin API when drift detected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL from frontend/.env was used. Backend pytest suite (7 tests) passed: default fallback A-E ranges, global/class predicate save+fetch, overlap/minmax validation (400), single /submissions/{id}/grade predicate auto-store, /submissions/bulk-grade predicate return+store, enrichment when grade_predicate missing in DB on /submissions response, and /reports/grades.xlsx Predikat header verification. Playwright passed: admin Predikat page add/remove/save, grading table predicate cells present, student feedback shows grade with predicate, and mobile student layout remains usable.
rca of the issue: No blocking defect found in requested scope. Initial auth failure in test setup was environment state drift (seeded student password altered by prior runs), mitigated by deterministic reset via admin reset-password endpoint in test fixture.
